title: MiSans Font
description: The MiSans Font for Minecraft requires the Caxton mod.
body:
# MiSans Font Resource Pack 🎨

Experience the all-new MiSans font and enjoy enhanced visuals in Minecraft! ✨

## Font Preview 👀

![Font Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GVtg8hzD/images/ffccb02bb3020632c7dc8d2786447737433f52f0.png)

## Requirements ✅

- **Minecraft**: Version 1.18.2 or later
- **Caxton Mod**: Ensure it is installed; otherwise, the resource pack will not display correctly

## Quick Start 🚀

1. **Install the Caxton Mod**  
   If not already installed, install the Caxton Mod.

2. **Download the Resource Pack**  
   Obtain the latest version of the MiSans Font Resource Pack.

3. **Install the Resource Pack**  
   Place the resource pack into your Minecraft resource packs directory.

## License 📜

MiSans Font is released under the [MiSans Font Intellectual Property License Agreement](https://hyperos.mi.com/font-download/MiSans%E5%AD%97%E4%BD%93%E7%9F%A5%E8%AF%86%E4%BA%A7%E6%9D%83%E8%AE%B8%E5%8F%AF%E5%8D%8F%E8%AE%AE.pdf).

Enjoy a new Minecraft font experience! 🎉
